features: Depend comfort protect pants for women keep you feeling secure and confident both day and night with a soft, comfortable, discreet fit
Depend total protect system has been specifically tailored with the combination of fast-absorption channels and odour-eliminating filters
Depend incontinence pants for women provide worry-free protection from leaks and odours
Specially made to fit the shape of a woman with a pant-like waistband, oval-cut leg openings and Fit-Flex protection with Lycra strands to ensure a smooth fit
Super absorbency, disposable pants have an overnight guarantee and come in a neutral beige colour
description: Product Description Reclaim and reconnect with what matters most in your life. Depend Comfort Protect Incontinence Pants for Women give you more freedom to forget about leaks.* Depend disposable pants feature the Total Protect system that has been specifically tailored with the combination of fast-absorption channels and odour-eliminating filters. Trust in Depend pants for worry-free protection from leaks and odours. Drawing wetness away from the skin, the comfortable, discreet pants have snug, pant-like leg openings with all-around elastics for a close-to-body fit - just step in and pull on. And with the improved waistband for added security, Depend Comfort Protect for Women provide a pant-like fit. Depend incontinence pants are soft, quiet, breathable and discreet. Depend incontinence pants for women are latex-free, lotion-free, fragrance-free and come in a neutral beige colour. Size small/medium fits dress sizes 8-14; size large fits dress sizes 14-22; size extra-large fits dress sizes 22-26. *vs. previous Depend pants products Directions Apply with the dark spot at the back. Dispose of after use. Do not wash or flush. Safety Warning The dark spot below the waistband indicates the back. Dispose of after use. Non-washable. Non-flushable. Box Contains 10x packs - 54 pants Manufacturer Contact Information Kimberly-Clark Europe Ltd, 40 London Road, Reigate, Surrey, RH2 9QP, UK. See more
